_comment: MISHKAN MCP template. /mishkan-init renders this to the project root as .mcp.json, substituting __MISHKAN_WORK_PORT__ with this project's work-store port (printed by ensure-work-store.sh). TWO cognee stores: 'cognee' = this project's OWN per-project WORK store (embedded Ladybug; its own container mishkan-work-<slug> + volume + port; physically isolated from other projects per ADR D-012) and 'cognee-curated' = the shared CURATED reference library (read-mostly, isolated graph; mishkan-curated-* on :7730, decision D-007). Both run from ~/.claude/mishkan/cognee/. Refs: https://docs.cognee.ai/cognee-mcp/mcp-local-setup
_isolation_warning: Per ADR D-012 each project gets its OWN physically-separate work store (own container + volume + embedded graph file) — isolation is by topology, NOT cognee's datasets= filter (which is advisory-only and does NOT isolate). The 'cognee' URL below is THIS project's own store, not the legacy shared :7777. Until ensure-work-store.sh has provisioned this project's store and __MISHKAN_WORK_PORT__ has been substituted, the cognee entry will not resolve.
